resources.string: This app uses Accessibility Service only to count Reels and Shorts activity for digital wellbeing tracking. No personal or sensitive data is collected.

Our app values your privacy above all else. This app does NOT ask for or access: SMS, Contacts, Storage, Financial accounts, Clipboard or call logs. Local data stays on your device inside a secure SQLite database.
I understand and accept the Privacy Policy and terms. I want to grant permissions to count my reels/shorts for positive habits.
